questions.question: Name two of the three actresses who starred in the movie 9 to 5.
questions.answer: Dolly Parton, Jane Fonda, Lily Tomlin

questions.question: Which of these is the most popular Gen X name for a female? Karen, Jennifer, Emma, Blakely
According to a Billy Joel song, when did the fire start?
questions.answer: "It was always burning since the world's been turning"

questions.question: What hockey player, nicknamed "The Great One," won four Stanley Cup championships in the 1980s and retired with 61 NHL records?
Jessie Spano in Saved by the Bell proclaimed that she was "so excited," but actually she was what?
